_comment: Median output-token compression ratio per level vs a normal Thai answer (1 - terse/baseline). Used by stats.js to estimate tokens/cost saved. Calibrated 2026-06-16 from a 5-prompt run (explain / compare / why / how-to tasks). Values are TASK-DEPENDENT: summaries and code-fixes compress more (~0.7-0.8), long explanations less (~0.4). Re-derive with the calibration workflow when task mix changes.

calibration.note: Measured by output character ratio vs a normal-Thai baseline across lite/moderate/full.
